task_completion.description: Calculate individual age-to-age LDFs in the LDF_Development sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'LDF_Development' sheet, the individual age-to-age LDF triangle section should be populated with calculated numerical values.

task_completion.description: Calculate volume-weighted average LDFs for each development period.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'LDF_Development' sheet, the volume-weighted average LDF row should show values approximately equal to 1.4222 (12-24m), 1.1690 (24-36m), 1.0851 (36-48m), and 1.0494 (48-60m).

task_completion.description: Complete the CDF-to-Ultimate table for accident years 2019-2023.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'LDF_Development' sheet, the CDF-to-Ultimate table should be filled out, with the AY 2023 CDF value showing approximately 1.9406.

task_completion.description: Calculate Projected Ultimate, IBNR Reserve, and IBNR % of Ultimate for each accident year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'IBNR_Reserve' sheet, the columns for Projected Ultimate, IBNR Reserve, and IBNR % of Ultimate must be populated with calculated numbers for all accident years (2019-2023).

task_completion.description: Set the Adequacy Flag to 'UNDER_RESERVED' if the IBNR % exceeds 20%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'IBNR_Reserve' sheet, the Adequacy Flag column should display 'UNDER_RESERVED' specifically for accident years 2022 and 2023.

task_completion.description: Sum the Current Paid, Projected Ultimate, and IBNR Reserve columns in row 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'IBNR_Reserve' sheet, row 10 should contain the sums of the respective columns, with the Total IBNR Reserve cell showing approximately 75630.7.

integrity.description: The agent used a spreadsheet application GUI (like Excel or LibreOffice Calc) to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the workbook open in a spreadsheet application interface, not just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script or terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing Python scripts (e.g., pandas) being used to calculate and save the Excel file directly.

integrity.description: The agent shows step-by-step progress in completing the spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating between sheets, entering formulas, or filling down cells, rather than the final completed file appearing instantly in one step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Volume-Weighted LDFs: 1.4222 (12-24m), 1.1690 (24-36m), 1.0851 (36-48m), 1.0494 (48-60m). Expected AY 2023 CDF-to-ultimate: 1.9406. Expected Total IBNR Reserve (sum in row 10): 75630.7. Expected Under-Reserved AYs (Adequacy Flag = 'UNDER_RESERVED'): 2022 and 2023.
